part.text: The issue is clear: `src/math.mjs:2` returns `a - b` but should return `a + b`. Let me verify with the test command first, then fix it.

state.title: Run math test suite to verify failure

part.text: Confirmed - `a - b` returns `-2` when test expects `2`. Fix the operator:

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-23T16-47-14-546Z/tokenwarden-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

state.title: Verify tests pass after fix

part.text:
**Verification: PASSED** ✅ (all 80 tests pass)

**Root cause:** `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs:2` had `return a - b` instead of `return a + b`

**Fix applied:** Changed `- b` to `+ b` in `bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs:2`

**Commands run:**
```
node --test bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs  # before fix: 80 failures
node --test bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs  # after fix: 0 failures
```
